Metadata.title: Framecast AI
Metadata.description: Generate awesome headshots in minutes using AI

Hero.title: Studio-Quality Headshots, In Minutes
Hero.subtitle: Upload a few selfies, and our AI generates HD headshots perfect for LinkedIn, resumes, and professional portfolios. No studio required.
Hero.review1Text: Replaced my $300 studio shoot in 10 minutes.
Hero.review2Text: My LinkedIn profile views tripled overnight.
Hero.review3Text: Looks so real, no one believes it's AI.

HowItWorks.title: Your perfect headshot in
HowItWorks.subtitle: No expensive studio sessions. No awkward poses. Just upload, wait, and receive stunning professional headshots.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Submit 4 or more high-quality selfies. Ensure they are front-facing, with only one person, no hats or accessories.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: The AI magic takes ~20 minutes. You'll get an email when it's ready.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: You'll receive multiple AI headshots, ready for all use cases — from personal to professional — depending on the style you choose.
HowItWorks.resultsAlt: Results from Framecast AI headshot generator.
HowItWorks.comparisonItem4: Up to 8× cheaper than a photographer
HowItWorks.traditionalItem2: Reach out and wait for a response
HowItWorks.testimonial1Text: Framecast AI is impressive! Just uploaded a few casual photos and got back a perfect professional headshot. Ideal for LinkedIn profiles. Quick and stunning results!
HowItWorks.testimonial2Text: Quick and amazing! Uploaded selfies to Framecast AI, and the AI turned them into professional headshots. Great for busy professionals needing quality images fast.

EditingTools.title: From Selfies to Studio-Quality
EditingTools.subtitle: Train your personal AI model, generate stunning headshots in any style, and fine-tune every detail — all in minutes.
EditingTools.step1Desc: Upload a few selfies and we'll train a custom AI model that learns your unique features. It only takes a couple of minutes.
EditingTools.step2Desc: Browse our professional style packs — corporate, creative, casual, and more. Pick a style and generate headshots instantly.
EditingTools.step3Desc: Not quite perfect? Use our AI-powered Magic Editor to change backgrounds, outfits, or any detail with a simple text prompt.

FAQ.title: Frequently asked
FAQ.subtitle: Have more questions? You can email us at hello@jerrizz.com.
FAQ.q1: Can I get more credits at anytime?
FAQ.a1: Yes, you can get more credits whenever you want. No questions are asked while you do that and we would highly appreciate if you will give us some feedback.
FAQ.q2: How does Framecast AI's pricing work?
FAQ.a2: Our one-time payment plans are tiered according to the credits you buy. Understanding the task at hand and ironing out the wrinkles is key.
FAQ.a3: Protecting the data you trust to Framecast AI is our first priority. This part is really crucial in keeping the project in line to completion.
FAQ.q4: How do I increase the credits for any account?
FAQ.a4: To increase the credits for any account, you can purchase the credits by using one of the payment gateways attached.
FAQ.q5: Do I get access to every single headshot as shown?
FAQ.a5: Yes, you get access to every single headshot generated for lifetime.
FAQ.q6: How long does it take to generate my headshots?
FAQ.a6: Once your AI model finishes training, the headshot generation typically takes only a few minutes. You'll be notified immediately once they are ready.
FAQ.q7: What kind of photos should I upload for best results?
FAQ.a7: We recommend uploading 10-15 close-up photos featuring varied lighting, backgrounds, and facial expressions to give the AI the best reference for your face.
FAQ.q8: Can I use these headshots on my professional LinkedIn?
FAQ.a8: Absolutely! The headshots produced by Framecast AI are high-resolution, perfectly lit, and formatted ideally for LinkedIn, corporate bios, and CVs.
FAQ.q9: Do you offer a refund policy?
FAQ.a9: We stand by our highest quality output. If you encounter any technical issues or are profoundly unsatisfied with the result, please reach out to our support within 7 days.

FinalCTA.subtitle: Transform your everyday photos into stunning, studio-quality headshots in minutes. Level up your professional presence with our AI.

Footer.description: AI Headshot Generator for business photos, remote teams, CV photos, LinkedIn Profile Pictures and more.
Footer.trademark: is a registered trademark and does not imply any medical or academic qualifications.

About.metaDescription: About Us for Framecast AI, the AI headshot generator platform.
About.title: About Us
About.body: At Framecast AI, we believe that everyone deserves a professional headshot that captures their unique essence. Our AI-powered headshot generator makes it easy to create stunning, high-quality images without the hassle of traditional photo shoots. With just a few clicks, you can explore countless styles, backgrounds, and expressions to find the perfect headshot for your personal or professional needs. Say goodbye to awkward poses and expensive photographers - Framecast AI puts the power of professional headshots right at your fingertips.

PhotoRequirements.metaDescription: Learn how to get the best AI headshots by following our simple photo upload requirements.
PhotoRequirements.title: Photo requirements
PhotoRequirements.intro: Upload your best photos of yourself. The quality of your headshots depends on the quality of your photos.
PhotoRequirements.instructions: Follow these instructions in order to get the best results. Do not use multiple similar photos taken at the same time in the same outfit — the AI needs diverse sample photos to work properly.

ReviewsPage.metaDescription: See what our customers are saying about their AI-generated professional headshots.
ReviewsPage.trustedBadge: Trusted by professionals from world-class organizations

ReviewsHero.title: Trusted by Professionals Worldwide
ReviewsHero.subtitle: See what our customers are saying about their new AI-generated headshots. From LinkedIn profiles to team directories, we've helped thousands upgrade their professional image.

ReviewList.consent: All our reviews and photos are published with the customer's consent. We do not publish any reviews or photos without consent.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At Framecast AI, accessible from framecast.jerrizz.com, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal data.
Privacy.section1Intro: We collect the following types of data to provide and improve our services:
Privacy.section1PersonalInfoDesc: Name, email address, account credentials, payment information, and images or media you upload for processing.
Privacy.section1UsageDataDesc: IP addresses, browser types, device information, pages visited, features used, time spent on our site, crash reports, and other diagnostic data.
Privacy.section1CookiesDesc: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies, including:
Privacy.section1Cookie1: Necessary cookies for basic website functionalities.
Privacy.section1Cookie2: Analytics cookies to collect performance data.
Privacy.section1Cookie3: Advertising cookies for personalized ads and measuring their effectiveness.
Privacy.section2Intro: We use the collected information for various purposes, including:
Privacy.section2Item1: Service provision to process and deliver your headshots.
Privacy.section2Item2: Customer support to assist with inquiries and issues.
Privacy.section2Item3: Payment processing to manage billing and transactions.
Privacy.section2Item4: Marketing to provide personalized content and advertisements.
Privacy.section2Item5: Improvement of services by analyzing user trends.
Privacy.section3Intro: We do not sell your personal information. However, we may share your data with trusted partners under the following circumstances:
Privacy.section3Item1Desc: Third-party vendors that assist with hosting, analytics, payment processing, and customer support.
Privacy.section3Item2Desc: To comply with legal obligations, enforce our terms of service, or protect the rights and safety of our users.
Privacy.section3Item3Desc: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of all or a portion of our assets, your data may be transferred.
Privacy.section4Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
Privacy.section5Intro: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights:
Privacy.section5Item1: Access and obtain a copy of your data.
Privacy.section5Item4: Restrict or object to data processing.
Privacy.section5Item5: Data portability (receive your data in a machine-readable format).
Privacy.section5Outro: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at hello@jerrizz.com.
Privacy.section6Text: Our services are not directed at individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we find that we have inadvertently collected information from a child, we will take steps to delete it.
Privacy.section7Text: Your personal data may be transferred to and stored in countries outside of your home country. We ensure that such transfers comply with applicable data protection laws.
Privacy.section8Text: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy, or as required by law.
Privacy.section9Text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites. We recommend reviewing the privacy policies of any third-party services you visit.
Privacy.section10Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new policy on our website with the updated effective date.
Privacy.contact: If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at hello@jerrizz.com.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.section1Text: Welcome to Framecast AI ("Company," "we," "us," or "our"). These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of our AI-powered headshot generation service, website, and related applications (collectively, the "Service"). By accessing or using our Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you should not use our Service.
Terms.section2Text: Framecast AI provides an AI-powered headshot generation platform that allows users to upload photos and generate professional-quality headshots. Users must be at least 16 years of age to use our Service. You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with all applicable regulations.
Terms.section3Text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities under your account. You agree to provide accurate and up-to-date information during registration and to update it as needed. Framecast AI is not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to maintain account security.
Terms.section4Text: Access to certain features of our Service requires the purchase of credits. All purchases are final unless otherwise stated in our Refund Policy. We use Stripe, PayPal, or Razorpay for payment processing, and we do not store your payment card information.
Terms.section5Text: We retain your data, including uploaded photos and generated headshots, as necessary to provide the Service. You may request deletion of your data by contacting us at hello@jerrizz.com. Upon account deletion, we will remove your personal data within a reasonable timeframe, subject to any legal obligations.
Terms.section6Text: Our Service may integrate with third-party tools and platforms (e.g., Supabase for database hosting, Astria for AI processing, Stripe for payments). We are not responsible for the practices, content, or availability of third-party services. Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and policies.
Terms.section7Text: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Framecast AI shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use the Service. Our total liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount you paid for the Service in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.
Terms.section8Text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting to our website. Continued use of the Service after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new Terms.
Terms.section9Text: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms of Service, please contact us at hello@jerrizz.com.

Refund.title: Refund Policy
Refund.intro: Thank you for choosing our AI headshot generator service. We strive to provide the best experience for our users. Please review our refund policy below.
Refund.section1Intro: You may be eligible for a refund in the following scenarios:
Refund.section1Item1Text: If the system fails to generate any headshots despite having sufficient credits, you may request a full refund.
Refund.section1Item2Text: If the generated headshots are not representative of the uploaded photos (e.g., completely different faces, severe distortions), a partial or full refund may be offered.
Refund.section1Item3Text: If you were charged incorrectly (e.g., double billing or wrong amount), we will issue a correction or refund.
Refund.section2Text: Refund requests must be made within 7 days of the original purchase. Approved refunds will be processed within a reasonable timeframe, typically 5–10 business days depending on your bank or payment provider.
Refund.section3Intro: Refunds will not be issued under the following conditions:
Refund.section3Item1: If the user uploaded photos of insufficient quality or variety.
Refund.section3Item2: If the customer fails to provide the required number of training images.
Refund.section3Item3: If the dissatisfaction is based on subjective preferences or expectations not aligned with the examples shown on the website.
Refund.section3Item4: If the user's credits were used and headshots were generated as expected.
Refund.section4Text: We reserve the right to deny refund requests that appear to be abusive or part of a pattern intended to exploit the refund process. This includes, but is not limited to, repeated refund requests from the same user or account with similar claims.
Refund.section5Intro: Before requesting a refund, consider the following alternatives:
Refund.section5Item1: Contacting our support team for troubleshooting if you encounter issues.
Refund.section5Item2: Trying different photos to generate a new set of headshots.
Refund.section5Item3: Using edit credits to adjust backgrounds, outfits, or other aspects.
Refund.contact: If you have any questions or need to request a refund, please contact our support team at hello@jerrizz.com.
